case_title: GLADSTONE WOOD VS. HAMPTON-PORTER INVESTMENT BANKERS et al

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WOOD, GLADSTONE AS TO RESPONDENT HAMPTON-PORTER INVESTMENT BANKERS ADAMS, DAVID C JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GLADSTONE WOOD HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD CONTINUED FROM JUL-02-2003 TO LAW AND MOTION AT AUG-20-2003, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER MOVING PARTY.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-20-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER GLADSTONE WOOD PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD, OFF CALENDAR. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GLADSTONE WOOD'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. APPEARANCE: IN PROPRIA PERSONA PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED, BUT NOT SIGNED IMMEDIATELY OFF THE BENCH-TO BE REVIEWED. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WOOD, GLADSTONE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT HAMPTON-PORTER INVESTMENT BANKERS $30,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $5,224.00 INTEREST, $356.72 COSTS, $1,000.00 SANCTIONS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,580.72, PLUS POST-AWARD INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM OCTOBER 22, 2001 UNTIL THE AWARD IN PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
